## Product or Research Delta

Describe the observable improvement. Receipt-only or readiness-only churn is
not an acceptable delta unless this repairs a failing safety gate.

## Provenance

- Implementation and documentation:
- Proposal model and version:
- Independent review model and version:
- External provider call executed: no
- Human merge authority: Julius or another named human reviewer

## Evidence

- Focused tests:
- Public-safety scan:
- Scientific sources:
- Remaining uncertainty:

## Boundaries

- [ ] No private course, learner, health, mailbox, credential, or local-path data
- [ ] No final solution, grading, proctoring, AI-detection, or exam-clearance claim
- [ ] No direct main-branch change or autonomous merge
- [ ] Human review is still required
